steps.title: Read the boundary line and shading
steps.content: From the figure, the boundary line passes through $(0, -5)$, giving $y$-intercept $-5$, and rises steeply, giving slope $15$. So the boundary is $y = 15x - 5$. The shaded region lies above the line, so the inequality is $y \gt 15x - 5$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Two other options use slope $3$, which is too gentle for a steep line through $(0,-5)$. $y \lt 15x - 5$ shades below the line.

Only $y \gt 15x - 5$ matches both the slope ($15$) and the above-shading.

That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
